Class TacletBuilder<T extends Taclet>

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletBuilder<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FindTacletBuilder, NoFindTacletBuilder
public abstract class TacletBuilder<T extends Taclet> extends Object
abstract taclet builder class to be inherited from taclet builders specialised for their concrete taclet variant

    Add an additional generic condition on the instantiation of schema variables.
    void
    addVarsNew(SchemaVariable v, KeYJavaType type)
    adds a new new variable to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new and has the given type
    void
    addVarsNew(SchemaVariable v, SchemaVariable peerSV)
    adds a new new variable to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new and has the same type as peerSV
    void
    addVarsNew(NewVarcond nv)
    adds a new new variable to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new.
    void
    addVarsNew(ImmutableList<NewVarcond> list)
    adds a list of new variables to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v is new for all v's in the given list
    void

    adds a new NotFreeIn variable pair to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v0 is not free in v1.
    void
    addVarsNotFreeIn(ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> list)
    adds a list of NotFreeIn variable pairs to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v0 is not free in v1 for all entries (v0,v1) in the given list.

    • addVarsNotFreeIn

      public void addVarsNotFreeIn(Iterable<? extends SchemaVariable> v0, Iterable<? extends SchemaVariable> v1)

      public void addVarsNotFreeIn(Iterable<? extends SchemaVariable> v0, SchemaVariable... v1)

    • addVarsNotFreeIn

      public void addVarsNotFreeIn(ImmutableList<NotFreeIn> list)
      adds a list of NotFreeIn variable pairs to the variable conditions of the Taclet: v0 is not free in v1 for all entries (v0,v1) in the given list.

    • addVarsNewDependingOn

      public void addVarsNewDependingOn(SchemaVariable v0, SchemaVariable v1)
      Add a "v0 depending on v1"-statement. "v0" may not occur within the if sequent or the find formula/term, however, this is not checked

    • addVariableCondition

      public void addVariableCondition(VariableCondition vc)
      Add an additional generic condition on the instantiation of schema variables.

    • addTacletGoalTemplate

      public abstract void addTacletGoalTemplate(TacletGoalTemplate goal)
      adds a new goal descriptions to the goal descriptions of the Taclet. The TacletGoalTemplate must be of the appropriate kind (Rewrite/Ante/Succ), otherwise an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

    • addRuleSet

      public void addRuleSet(RuleSet rs)
      adds a new rule set to the rule sets of the Taclet.

    • setRuleSets

      public void setRuleSets(ImmutableList<RuleSet> rs)

    • ifSequent

      public Sequent ifSequent()

    • goalTemplates

      public ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> goalTemplates()

    • varsNotFreeIn

      public Iterator<NotFreeIn> varsNotFreeIn()

    • setTacletGoalTemplates

      public void setTacletGoalTemplates(ImmutableList<TacletGoalTemplate> g)

    • getTaclet

      public abstract T getTaclet()
      builds and returns the Taclet that is specified by former set... / add... methods. If no name is specified then an Taclet with an empty string name is build. No specifications for variable conditions, goals or rule sets imply that the corresponding parts of the Taclet are empty. No specification for the if-sequence is represented as a sequent with two empty semisequences. No specification for the interactive or recursive flags imply that the flags are not set. No specified find part for Taclets that require a find part causes an IllegalStateException.

    • getTacletWithoutInactiveGoalTemplates

      public T getTacletWithoutInactiveGoalTemplates(Set<Choice> active)

    • setOrigin

      public void setOrigin(String origin)

    • setHelpText

      public void setHelpText(@Nullable Object accept)
